topCandidate.label: SHORT: enter when ema_ratio_20 > 0.98, exit when ema_ratio_20 < 0.98

note: Hand-constructed from the locked markdown record (docs/preregistration/10C-depth1-rsi-ema.md), not regenerated by re-execution. search-10c.ts calls the LIVE Kraken OHLC endpoint (ingestOHLCV) — re-running it now would NOT reproduce the original 745-bar window (Kraken's available history has moved forward in time since this search ran), so it was deliberately not re-run. topCandidateReturns is null because no per-trade JSON was captured at the time of the original run and there is no safe way to regenerate it without violating that constraint.
